text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When the sun peeks out from the clouds, 
Ryan and Dober pop into my head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You see, a little while ago, when there was 
a sudden shower of rain, I went to give them 
an umbrella…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Lest I slip and fall, I walked 
extra carefully, and by the time 
I arrived the rain had stopped…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Even so, the two of them insisted on 
using the umbrella in the sun, so as not 
to let my efforts go to waste. Hehe, it's a 
very heartwarming memory.
